title: Galley-La Inspects the Merry
description: The crew meets Water Seven’s elite shipwrights while Iceburg and Galley-La become central to the Merry’s future.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Iceburg, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Paulie. The crew meets Water Seven’s elite shipwrights while Iceburg and Galley-La become central to the Merry’s future.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Pumpenses are provided by the new

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Please do not make Karifa angry...

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Most of those kicks landed on him!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I didn't like the lip mark.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: So we'll wait until he returns.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I'll show you around the place.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Okay! Let's go see the shipyard!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah. I almost forgot our money...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Thanks for the money, bro!! hahah!!

summary: The crew meets Water Seven’s elite shipwrights while Iceburg and Galley-La become central to the Merry’s future.
